headline: EA to Release Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year End 2026 Results on May 5, 2026
summary: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., April 14, 2026--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) will release its financial results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026 after the close of market on Tuesday, May 5, 2026.

raw.headline: EA to Release Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year End 2026 Results on May 5, 2026
raw.summary: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., April 14, 2026--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) will release its financial results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026 after the close of market on Tuesday, May 5, 2026.

headline: Software sting: Tech share of direct lending deals drops in Q1 – US Private Credit Monitor
summary: The often steady sectoral mix of direct lending deals shifted notably in the first quarter, with Healthcare displacing Technology as the sector receiving the largest share of direct lending deployment, according to LCD data. The latest US Private Credit Monitor shows that healthcare deals made up 22% of direct lending issuance YTD through March, up from 18% in 2025, while Tech’s share slipped to 14% YTD from 18% in 2025.
